content.scenarioHint: 你在电器商店查看一台电动钻，销售员告诉你它的电池是20V，续航90分钟。你想进一步了解它的充电时间和是否支持快充。
content.speakerText: This one’s got a 20V battery — lasts about 90 mins on a charge.
content.speakerTextCn: 这款是20伏电池，充一次能用90分钟。
expectedAnswers: How long does it take to fully charge?
Does it support fast charging? I need to get back to work quickly.
Can I buy an extra battery to swap in while the other one charges?
Is the charger included, or do I need to buy it separately?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确询问了充电时间或快充功能
语言准确性：语法和时态使用正确，无明显错误
表达自然度：使用了日常口语中常见的表达方式
关键词覆盖：包含 charging, fast charge, extra battery, charger 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: The tool delivers 650 inch-pounds of torque and runs for 3 hours on a single charge.
content.speakerTextCn: 这款工具提供650英寸磅的扭矩，单次充电可运行3小时。
expectedAnswers: 650 inch-pounds? That’s solid for heavy-duty work.
How’s the battery life compared to the 18V model?
Does the torque adjust automatically, or do I have to switch manually?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否针对扭矩或续航提出专业性追问
语言准确性：正确使用torque、battery life、adjust等术语
表达自然度：语气专业但不生硬，符合工具购买场景
关键词覆盖：使用了torque、battery life、adjust、charge等核心词
